humanSummary.text: Audit found no P0/P1 blockers. KAIFUU-082 satisfies alpha blocking criteria; three P2 hardening findings were converted into follow-up DAG nodes.

findings.title: Shift-JIS slot preflight uses a narrow hand-coded subset
findings.description: The Shift-JIS encoder accepts ASCII, halfwidth kana, and a small kana/punctuation table instead of full Shift-JIS compatibility.

evidence.detail: Audit found common kanji/fullwidth text can be reported as invalid despite the slot encoding being named shift_jis.

findings.impact: Valid real game text may be rejected by byte-budget preflight until a real codec or clearly scoped subset exists.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: Shift-JIS slot preflight uses a real documented codec or is renamed/scoped as a documented subset.
Fixtures cover accepted common kanji/fullwidth cases and rejected unmappable cases for the chosen encoding contract.

proposedDagNode.title: Full Shift-JIS string-slot codec contract
proposedDagNode.summary: Replace or explicitly scope the KAIFUU-082 hand-coded Shift-JIS subset so encoded string-slot preflight handles real game text predictably.
acceptanceCriteria: Valid common Shift-JIS kanji and fullwidth strings are accepted when they fit the slot budget.
Unmappable Unicode text fails with slot id, byte range, and remediation code.
The documented encoding name matches the actual codec behavior.
auditFocus: False invalid_encoding diagnostics for valid Shift-JIS

findings.title: CLI preflight failure output drops slot context
findings.description: The CLI reports only failure codes for encoded string-slot preflight failures, dropping slot id, byte range, and remediation details produced by the adapter failure.

evidence.detail: Audit compared detailed AdapterFailure construction with the CLI patch error path.

findings.impact: Users can see a safe preflight failure without enough context to fix the offending slot.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: CLI patch failure output includes redacted slot id, byte range, and remediation for encoded string-slot preflight failures.
No-output-mutation preflight failures remain covered by regression tests.

proposedDagNode.title: Encoded slot CLI diagnostic detail
proposedDagNode.summary: Expose redacted encoded string-slot preflight slot id, byte range, and remediation details through Kaifuu CLI patch failure reporting.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI patch preflight failures include slot id, byte range, semantic code, and remediation code.
Sensitive paths or raw private payloads remain redacted in diagnostic output.
Patch output directories remain unmodified on preflight failure.
auditFocus: Actionable slot context lost in CLI errors

findings.title: Duplicate protected token multiplicity is not enforced in core slot validation
findings.description: Core EncodedStringSlot protected-span validation checks by raw text and can pass repeated identical protected tokens with only one target occurrence.

evidence.detail: Audit found fixture-adapter count checks do not protect direct users of the public EncodedStringSlot validator.

findings.impact: Adapters using the core validator directly can miss dropped duplicate placeholders.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: Core EncodedStringSlot validates protected spans as a multiset of required raw tokens and target ranges.
A fixture with duplicate same-raw protected tokens fails when one occurrence is missing or mapped incorrectly.

proposedDagNode.title: Encoded slot duplicate protected-token validation
proposedDagNode.summary: Make core encoded string-slot protected-span validation enforce multiplicity for repeated identical protected tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: Two identical source protected tokens require two valid target mappings or occurrences.
Missing or collapsed duplicate protected tokens fail with slot id and protected span diagnostics.
Existing distinct-token protected span fixtures continue to pass.
auditFocus: Fixture adapter masking core validator gaps
